pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers so low... just like the spark that remains in my soul. He is gone, and with him, the very sun has set upon my life. Everything is hollow now. I feel as though I am but a ghost wandering these cold halls, waiting for the shroud to finally pull me into the stillness. It would be so much kinder to simply... cease. To let the darkness take what is left of this broken heart.
